Sage Bot Item Code: SL53
Thunderous Wrath Armor's Soul

For the duration of the battle, damage dealt to the unit is reduced by 20%.

Every once in a while, the fighter becomes immune to effects that limit movement, stun, freeze, petrify, jelly, or fear for 4 s.

Requirements: 98-100
